\\r\\n 
\\r\\nWelcome to Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private products and services!
\\r\\n 
\\r\\nIn order to protect user information, Shanghai Dayee Cloud Computing Co., Ltd. (hereinafter referred to as "Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private" or "we") and its affiliates will take the corresponding safety precautions in accordance with applicable laws and regulations. For this purpose, Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private has developed this Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private Privacy Policy (hereinafter referred to as the "privacy policy") and reminds you that: you must carefully read and thoroughly understand this privacy policy before using Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private services, and confirm that you fully understand and agree to the terms before using the related products and services. By using the services provided by Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private, you accept and agree to this privacy policy.
\\r\\n 
\\r\\nIntelligent Recruitment Management System Private (hereinafter referred to as "we") respects and protects user information and will treat the information with high degree of diligence and prudence. When you use Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private services, we will collect, process and disclose your information in accordance with this privacy policy. We hope that this privacy policy can give you a clear picture of how we treat your information, so we encourage you to read this privacy policy in its entirety to help you understand how to protect your privacy.
\\r\\n 
\\r\\n[Hint]
\\r\\nIt is recommended that you carefully read the Privacy Policy (especially the contents in bold) and become familiar with our rules for the processing of your personal information. If you have any questions about the content of this document, you may consult us via the contact details listed in the Privacy Policy ("This Privacy Policy").
\\r\\n 
\\r\\nIf you have any questions, comments, or suggestions about this privacy policy, you may contact us at: Email: service@dayee.com Address:Building 4, No. 1588 Xinyang Highway, Lingang New Area, China (Shanghai) Pilot Free Trade Zone
\\r\\n 
\\r\\nThis privacy policy mainly includes the following contents:
\\r\\n1. Definitions
\\r\\n2. Applicable Scope
\\r\\n3. Collection and Use of User Personal Information
\\r\\n4. Means of Sharing, Transferring and Publicly Disclosing User Personal Information
\\r\\n5. User Business Data and Public Information
\\r\\n6. User Rights Terms
\\r\\n7. Use of Cookies and Similar Technologies
\\r\\n8. User Personal Information Security Protection Measures
\\r\\n9. How We Store User Personal Information
\\r\\n10. Special Terms for User Personal Information of Minors
\\r\\n11. Update of Privacy Policy
\\r\\n12. Complaints and Reporting
\\r\\n13. Our Contact Information\\r\\n

 

\\r\\n\\r\\n

1. Definitions

\\r\\n1.1. Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private website: refers to Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private official website (https://en.dayee.com/) and its clients .
\\r\\n1.2. Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private: unless otherwise stipulated, it refers to Shanghai Dayee Cloud Computing Co., Ltd., the operator of the Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private website.
\\r\\n1.3. Users: refer to individuals, enterprises, companies, institutions, and other organizations that have received or purchased Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private services and products and received relevant al and network support services. Users have civil rights and must be able to independently assume civil obligations under the laws of the People's Republic of China.
\\r\\n1.4. User Personal Information: refers to user information submitted by users to Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private or collected by Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private. The above information may be recorded electronically or by other means, and may be used alone or in combination with other information to identify a specific natural person or reflect the activities of a specific natural person.In this Privacy Policy, personal information includes: your personal information related to your potential job application and employment with the Company. In particular, we will process some, certain or all of the following categories of your personal information:
\\r\\n(1) Master data: including but not limited to name, age, gender, date of birth, citizen identity, marital status, nationality, race, ethnicity, qualifications, income, hobbies, photos or other images (including closed-circuit television images), biometric data, and audio/video materials, etc.;
\\r\\n(2) Contact information: including but not limited to home address, telephone number, email address, work address, work telephone number, etc.;
\\r\\n(3) Recruitment data: including but not limited
